title: Document exit codes for podman exec
body:
Also fix podman run exit codes to show real messages when failures
happen.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #3311) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
If you can rebase and hit comments I'd love this in 1.4.1
Two nits.  Otherwise LGTM.  If you want to push this through and circle back for the nits, fine by me.
Lets merge and then You or I could open a PR to fix them.  I just don't want to hold @mheon up on cutting a new release waiting for this.
